meta.title: Homemade by Dia Pastry Shop - Natural Delights in Buftea

home.title: Licensed pastry workshop,
home.titleLine2: custom cakes and desserts made to order in Buftea (Ilfov)

aboutUs.intro: Hi there! 😊 For those who don't know me yet, I'm Diana.
aboutUs.p1: My passion for sweets began many years ago when I was looking for a stable job and ended up, by chance, working as a pastry assistant at a bakery in Bucharest. I was deeply impressed to discover the process of making creams (the natural ones, of course - no premixes here), sponge cakes, and other sweet delights.
aboutUs.p2: I decided to develop my skills and completed a specialized course in pastry and confectionery.
aboutUs.p3: Making cakes from classic recipes wasn't enough for me, so I experimented and adapted many elements to turn my desserts into something truly special. 💕
aboutUs.p4: I followed my passion and managed to open my own small pastry workshop, Homemade by Dia, here in Buftea, where I create premium, always-fresh products made to order: custom cakes, delicious pastries, and candy bars for special events.
aboutUs.p5: I'm thrilled to be part of your celebrations through my sweet creations, whether it's birthdays, family gatherings, weddings, christenings, or other special occasions.
aboutUs.p6: Thank you all for your support and your kind and constructive feedback!
aboutUs.imageAlt: Diana, founder of Homemade by Dia, at an event candy bar with a variety of artisan desserts.

catalog.decorNote: Custom decorations are charged separately, starting from {decorMin} lei up to {decorMax} lei depending on complexity
catalog.allergyNote: If you have any allergies or food intolerances, please contact us for more information before placing your order
catalog.chouxList: Choux: pistachio & raspberry, hazelnut, chocolate, lemon meringue, exotic
catalog.tarteList: Tarts: fruit, caramel, pistachio & raspberry, hazelnut, chocolate, lemon meringue, exotic
catalog.miniPastriesList: Mini pastries: pavlova, carrot, medovik, snickers, classic savarin, pistachio savarin
catalog.standardOfferDesc: The candy bar package is {price} lei/person and includes {pastriesPerPerson} pastries per person from a selection of {varietiesCount} varieties, plus complimentary meringues and cookies. Can be customized to your preferences. Valid for minimum {minimumGuests} guests.
catalog.dessertsGlassList: Desserts in glass: chocolate mousse, forest fruits, exotic, panna cotta, cheesecake
catalog.customThemeDesc: For a custom theme add +{customThemeSurcharge} lei/person (includes toppers, child's name, edible images, etc.).
